content: Scan the provided QR code using your authenticator app. Alternatively, manually enter the given secret key into your app: <1>{{ secretKey }}</1>.

comment.text: This is a descriptive text within a two-factor authentication setup, instructing the user on how to connect an authenticator app. It includes a variable `{{ secretKey }}` which will be replaced by a unique secret key.

usage.context: {t("ConnectApp")}
